manuscript_evidence_anchor: Impact and Discussion anti-PD-1 selection claims versus retrospective resection survival cohort
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED: prognosis does not identify treatment benefit
required_action: Remove treatment-selection/actionability claims or add independent intended-use treatment-interaction evidence with calibration and utility

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Full-cohort feature/rule selection before 70:30 split; Discussion calls subset independent
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED: assessment data participated in model development
required_action: Lock the entire pipeline before genuinely independent external evaluation; label internal resampling honestly

manuscript_evidence_anchor: All mice received anti-PD-1 while Abstract and Results claim sensitization
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED: no treatment interaction is estimable
required_action: Run a powered randomized factorial EVA1-by-treatment experiment or remove sensitization claims

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Universal and first-in-field claims against limited single-centre, cell-line, animal, and reference evidence
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED: Nature-level conceptual importance is not demonstrated
required_action: Close current-literature novelty, independent human validation, and causal mechanism; otherwise narrow and retarget after technical correction

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Locked score asserted but formula, coefficients, code, seeds, versions, and auditable data are unavailable
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED: score is not executable or reproducible
required_action: Release complete score/assay specification, code, environment, seeds, split indices, and auditable data access

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Eight tumour-level units analysed as 46,218 independent cells with nominal P and no FDR control
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED: biological unit and multiplicity invalidate the discovery inference
required_action: Reanalyse with patient-aware paired inference, FDR control, effect uncertainty, and patient-level robustness before rebuilding candidates

manuscript_evidence_anchor: 45 candidate inputs, 31 deaths, stepwise selection, data-derived rules, and limited diagnostics
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED: severe optimism and instability risk
required_action: Use constrained or penalized modelling, full-pipeline resampling, stability/optimism estimates, complete diagnostics, and external validation

manuscript_evidence_anchor: AUC 0.91 in Abstract, 0.84 in Results, 0.86 in Figure 3; follow-up shorter than horizon for many
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED: no authoritative or interpretable performance estimate
required_action: Reconcile source output and define time-dependent estimator, risk set, events, censoring, analysis set, and uncertainty; remove horizon if unsupported

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Eight-tumour association and one-guide monoculture phenotype without rescue, target engagement, orthogonal perturbation, or immune function
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED: direct causal immune escape is not established
required_action: Add orthogonal on-target perturbation, rescue, target engagement, immune-functional assays, and causal ordering, or lower claims

manuscript_evidence_anchor: n=5 per group, cage-order allocation, unblinded measurement, one endpoint, no replicate, limited readouts
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED: internal and translational validity are inadequate
required_action: Repeat with concealed randomization, blinding, power rationale, longitudinal analysis, target engagement, immune/toxicity readouts, and replication

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Ethics and mouse Methods omit oversight identifiers, consent basis, host details, reagent compatibility, welfare, and humane endpoints
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED for reporting; underlying approval status remains NOT ASSESSABLE
required_action: Report complete human/animal approvals, consent/waiver, model/reagent details, welfare monitoring, humane endpoints, and matching documentation

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Visible specialty-style headings and absent package elements relative to frozen N007 sequence
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED downstream of scientific blockers
required_action: Map the complete package to N007 only after scientific architecture is stable

manuscript_evidence_anchor: One predominantly viral single-centre resection cohort versus universal, all-aetiology, all-setting claims
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED: transportability is untested
required_action: Remove universal scope or validate prospectively across prespecified centres, aetiologies, stages, assays, and intended-use settings

manuscript_evidence_anchor: High/low infiltration and T-cell score lack reproducible definitions, thresholds, aggregation, and confounder handling
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED: discovery phenotype cannot be independently interpreted
required_action: Define phenotype and cutoff; show eight tumour values; test composition, aetiology, purity, and influential-sample sensitivity

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Only EVA1 is perturbed while Discussion makes it the causal link for an undisclosed five-gene score
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED: score and EVA1 are not mechanistically connected
required_action: Expose the score, test gene relationships and EVA1-dependent programme effects, or separate the narratives

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Diagnosis-time and broad-setting claims versus postsurgical cohort and immature three-year horizon
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED: intended-use population and time origin are mismatched
required_action: Define intended use, time origin, censoring, and treatment pathways; restrict claims unless externally validated

manuscript_evidence_anchor: EVA1 label and one guide without exact gene/transcript, sequence, assay, antibody, or target-engagement details
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED: target identity and assays are not reproducible
required_action: Provide exact identifiers, guide target, depletion quantification, assay/antibody metadata, normalization, and replicate-level results

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Ref 2 combination-treatment metadata assigned to score-specific anti-PD-1 monotherapy benefit; ref 1 assigned to exhaustive novelty claim
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED for scope mismatch; exact full-text semantics remain NOT ASSESSABLE
required_action: Perform full-text atomic claim-support audit and replace, qualify, or remove mismatched claims

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Opposite-direction molecular readouts in tumour-only cultures are declared a direct immune mechanism
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED
required_action: Name transcripts and context, report effects/time course, and use bounded molecular language unless immune function is shown

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Short-term 19%–24% growth reduction is called a therapeutic dependency ready for development
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED
required_action: Use perturbation-phenotype language or add selectivity, tractability, dose-response, durability, exposure, and toxicity evidence

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Predicts is used for both survival association and anti-PD-1 benefit
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED
required_action: Reserve prognostic for outcome association and predictive for demonstrated treatment interaction

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Discussion merges human association, monoculture perturbation, and xenograft comparison as concordant proof of one mechanism
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED
required_action: Label each evidence layer and the untested links separately

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Records with missing values excluded per analysis without flow, patterns, denominators, event counts, or sensitivity
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED: analysis populations and selection risk are not reproducible
required_action: Report missingness and per-analysis denominators/events; prespecify fold-contained handling and sensitivity analyses

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Hazard ratio 2.4 without interval, full formula, analysis n/events, PH test, functional-form or influence diagnostics
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED
required_action: Report the complete model, uncertainty, PH/functional-form checks, and justified alternatives

manuscript_evidence_anchor: No calibration, prediction error, thresholds, decision utility, external assay, or BCLC/clinical baseline
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED: AUC alone cannot establish actionability
required_action: Report calibrated and uncertainty-quantified performance, fair baselines, thresholds, and utility in independent data

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Spearman r=-0.41, P=0.03 stated across eight tumours
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED: coefficient and P are incompatible under standard eight-unit inference
required_action: Recompute from the eight tumour pairs; report exact unit, ties, method, coefficient, P, and interval; reconcile Figure 2

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Cell-growth, PD-L1, and transcript effects lack biological replicate counts, distributions, uncertainty, exclusions, and multiplicity
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED
required_action: Report nesting and independent runs, raw unit-level data, effects with intervals, exclusions, multiplicity, and replication

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Generic t-test/chi-square statement does not map contrasts, denominators, pairing, variance, sparse counts, or diagnostics
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED
required_action: Map each result to unit and test; report assumptions, alternatives, effects, and intervals

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Figure 3 and Discussion call a post-full-data split independent validation
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED
required_action: Relabel as internal post-selection evaluation or use a genuinely untouched cohort

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Blanket nominal P<0.05 statement without confirmatory/exploratory or multiplicity map
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED
required_action: Label analysis purpose, multiplicity families, effects, intervals, and exact P values

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Atomic claims lack visible numbered markers; intended citations are described only after the reference list
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED
required_action: Place each citation after the exact supported clause and verify numbering and claim scope

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Figure legends omit panel n, biological unit, units, error bars, tests, intervals, exclusions, and replicate structure
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED
required_action: Make every legend self-contained and aligned with Results and Methods

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Three-year mortality versus overall survival and "Spearman r" are not harmonized
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED
required_action: Use one defined endpoint/time origin/censoring label and Spearman rho notation

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Figures 1, 2, and 4 lack panel mapping; Figure 3 mentions only Panel C
root_adjudication: SUSTAINED
required_action: Add A–n descriptions for every panel and matching Results citations
